Done. Here's what was changed in `/mnt/data/hello-world/congress.html`:

**What was broken:** `setCenterDeliberating` was only toggling `display:none/inline` on an `<a>` tag pointing to the YouTube watch URL. Clicking a link manually is the only way that ever worked — no autoplay.

**What was fixed:**

1. **New `#soundtrackWrap` div** replaces the visible role of the old link. It holds a label and gets the iframe appended to it.
